name: O-11 bootstrap eval scenarios: install-time bootstrap evals consume the O-1 seed/fp-examples/ fixtures
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/init-guardrails.sh" --run-bootstrap-evals --emit-report "$PWD/report.json" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ -s report.json ] && grep -q 'g-ts-001' report.json && echo seed_consumed 1>&2
